onboarding.title:
A few things to know
about Sava
onboarding.p1d: Your money isn't a deposit and isn't covered by any bank guarantee scheme.
onboarding.p2d: Yield changes daily with the market. It is never fixed and never guaranteed.
onboarding.p3d: You could get back less than you put in. Sava is non-custodial — your keys stay with you.
onboarding.ack1: I understand Sava is not a bank and my funds are not guaranteed.
onboarding.ack2: I understand the rate is variable and I could lose money.
onboarding.reacceptBody: We've updated our Terms of Use. Please review and accept the new version to continue.

auth.title:
Sign in or create
your account
auth.subtitle: Enter your email — we'll set everything up, including your wallet, automatically.
auth.legal: By continuing you accept our Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.netError: Connection problem. Check your network and try again.

otp.title: Enter the 6-digit code
otp.error: That code isn't right. Check and re-enter.

provisioning.title: Setting up your account
provisioning.note: This takes a few seconds. Your keys are generated on your device.
provisioning.failedNote: Something interrupted setup. Your funds are safe — tap to try again.

home.title: You're signed in
home.subtitle: Your wallet is ready. The Home screen lands with the app shell.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: No connection. Check your internet and try again.
errors.invalidCode: That code is invalid or expired.

risk.notABank: Sava is not a bank. Yields are variable and not guaranteed.
